channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti on litter bins in Pickhurst Green, 11th March
item.description:
There is graffiti on the litter bins in Pickhurst Green. This graffiti needs to be removed ASAP, otherwise it will multiply.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickhurst Lane, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TEST - SS back office, 11th March
item.description:
TEST - SS back office
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish all thrown there, 11th March
item.description:
All along PARK MEAD there is rubbish thrown on the grass verges between the A2 and park mead Gas canisters, furniture, bottles, cans, garden rubbish, crisp packets etc etc

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): East Rochester Way, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Clothing, 11th March
item.description:
Several bags of old clothes and other assorted rubbish dumped on the pavement next to the clothing donation bin.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lovel Avenue, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing black bin on Batley Road, 11th March
item.description:
Overflowing bin
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington High Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ongoing issue of domestic waste being dumped next to/in public bin, 11th March
item.description:
Another day, another couple of bags of domestic waste left by this public bin. Often get ripped open by animals and spread around the street. Can something be done to deter this?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Penge Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter in front of bus shelter 0106 4863 in Hayes Lane, 11th March
item.description:
There is litter in front of bus shelter 0106 4863 in Hayes Lane. Please would you arrange for this to be picked up and removed ASAP.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayes Lane, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A sink hole is developing, 11th March
item.description:
Outside 72/74 Hindmans Road, there is a deep hole in the road. Beneath the hole is a deep void. It looks like it could collapse at any moment.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 74, Hindmans Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned shopping trolley, 11th March
item.description:
Sainsbury's trolley left in paved area behind The Alexandra pub

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bycroft Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge fly tipped on fridge, 11th March
item.description:
Someone has fly tipped a large fridge on the street on Portland Rise.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Seven Sisters Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling on pavements, 11th March
item.description:
As above
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Shirley Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain, 11th March
item.description:
As seen in photo, the drain in the road by the pub is fully blocked with water, even on a sunny day.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 99, High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter from bin collections, 11th March
item.description:
In gutters and paths - never cleaned
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Shirley Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox on the road, 11th March
item.description:
Needs to be removed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Heber Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress blocking pavement, 11th March
item.description:
A mattress and bit of wood has been dumped and is blocking the pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gatling Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shower tray dumped, 11th March
item.description:
White plastic shower tray flytipped on pavement, it has been there a couple of weeks and now being used as a graffiti opportunity too.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Penge Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain at junction of Shortlands Road and Valley Road, 11th March
item.description:
The drain at the junction of Shortlands Road and Valley Road is blocked and water cannot go down. With the recent amount of rain, huge puddles form when it pours. Please would you arrange for the drain to be unblocked and cleared out ASAP.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip of fridge, 11th March
item.description:
Please remove fly tip of fridge on grass area near Dunkery Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Keverne Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking sign leaning into pavement, 11th March
item.description:
I think a car has hit this parking sign near 155 Parish Lane and made it lean inwards over the pavement, possibly putting pedestrians at risk.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parish Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree obscuring street light, 11th March
item.description:
The street light is obscured by a huge tree and is blocking the light. As a result, the walkway and entrance to the path is very dark and presents a hazard to users. Last night this image was captured on cctv showing an individual relieving himself against a garden fence - immediately following this a cyclist rode through and almost collided with the person. This has previously been reported and remedial action was supposed to have been taken to reduce the tree’s branches. It is causing anti social behaviour and can be damgerous for lone females walking through this area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wallace Close, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Light in park or open space
